args.Description: "Map SVG hotspots and region centers to the 2816x1536 aspect ratio of the user illustration in app.js."
args.Instruction: "Update SVG viewBox, polygon points, and REGION_CENTERS matching the 2816x1536 illustration layout."
args.ReplacementContent:

args.TargetContent:
"            <!-- マップコンテナ -->
            <div class="cyber-map-container" id="map-3d-container" style="background-image: url('images/cyber_world_map.png');">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 1000" class="cyber-world-map" id="map-hotspots-svg">
                    <!-- 地域ごとのホットスポットポリゴン -->
                    <polygon class="map-region-hotspot" data-region="北アメリカ" fill="none" stroke="none" points="80,180 200,160 300,160 410,160 420,240 360,280 330,340 270,400 240,450 210,480 180,470 180,410 150,380 180,330 160,260 100,270" />
                    <polygon class="map-region-hotspot" data-region="南アメリカ" fill="none" stroke="none" points="220,450 260,440 300,460 320,500 310,560 280,660 260,710 240,780 210,690 190,610 180,520 190,470" />
                    <polygon class="map-region-hotspot" data-region="ユーラシア" fill="none" stroke="none" points="390,240 410,190 470,170 560,160 660,160 760,160 860,180 930,190 940,280 900,400 860,460 800,490 730,510 690,470 630,440 560,430 490,440 470,400 430,360 400,280" />
                    <polygon class="map-region-hotspot" data-region="アフリカ" fill="none" stroke="none" points="400,390 470,400 480,440 520,430 580,440 600,500 580,600 560,680 520,710 490,660 460,580 420,510 390,450" />
                    <polygon class="map-region-hotspot" data-region="オセアニア" fill="none" stroke="none" points="730,560 800,540 860,560 890,600 880,690 820,720 740,690 710,630" />
                    <polygon class="map-region-hotspot" data-region="日本" fill="none" stroke="none" points="820,300 840,280 870,300 880,340 860,380 830,350" />
                    
                    <!-- ピンマーカー -->
                    <g id="globe-marker" style="display: none;">
                        <circle r="12" fill="var(--secondary-neon)" filter="drop-shadow(0 0 8px var(--secondary-neon))" />
